product.name: Social Fuel Plant Protein Granola Blasts
product.category: Grocery & Gourmet Food > Breakfast Cereal > Plant Protein Granola
product.description: A bold, crunchy, plant-powered granola designed for social snacking. A lively blend of rolled oats, pea protein crisps, pumpkin seeds, maple-cinnamon clusters, and dark chocolate chips. Developed for Gen Z mornings, commutes, and hangouts where taste matters as much as function. This hybrid granola delivers clean energy, plant protein, and crunch without being overly sweet or heavy.

competitors.name: Nature Valley
competitors.key_feature: Crunchy oats and honey granola, widely available and affordable whole-grain snack

competitors.name: Kashi
competitors.key_feature: Whole-grain, plant-based granola with fiber and protein from seven whole grains

competitors.name: Purely Elizabeth
competitors.key_feature: Ancient grain granola with coconut sugar and superfood ingredients, organic and gluten-free
